description: One of the largest ethnic organized crime groups in the former Soviet Union, based in the North Caucasus and Moscow. Founded in the 1980s by Nikolay Suleimanov, it uses Chechen tribal structures (teip) and the abrek concept. Active in money laundering, racketeering, arms and drug trafficking, and cybercrime, with ties to Chechen separatism. Still active as of the present.
